name: @vanillagreen/pi-codex-minimal-tools
description: Minimal Codex/OpenAI native tools for Pi: Codex image_generation, view_image, apply_patch

settings.label: Enable Codex minimal tools
settings.description: Register image_generation, view_image, and apply_patch. Tools only activate on OpenAI/Codex-like models — they stay hidden on Anthropic/Claude-bridge sessions.

settings.label: Glyph style
settings.description: Glyphs for vstack-owned UI chrome. Unicode is the default; ASCII uses plain box/status/separator characters for terminal compatibility. pi-tool-renderer's global override wins when set.

settings.label: Auto-add tools to active set
settings.description: When a supported OpenAI/Codex model is selected, add this package's enabled tools to the model's active tool list. Off = activate manually.

settings.label: Native image_generation on Codex
settings.description: Rewrite this package's image_generation function to OpenAI's Responses-API native tool when the model is openai-codex. Codex-specific; coexists with Pi 0.75's general image APIs. Does not affect view_image or apply_patch.

settings.label: Enable image_generation
settings.description: Expose image_generation on supported OpenAI Codex image-capable models.

settings.label: Image output directory
settings.description: Directory for generated images, relative to the workspace/repo root unless absolute.

settings.label: Direct image API model
settings.description: Image model for optional direct OpenAI Images API fallback.

settings.label: Direct Images API fallback
settings.description: Allow direct OpenAI Images API generation with OPENAI_API_KEY when native Codex image_generation is unavailable.

settings.label: Enable view_image
settings.description: Expose local image viewing on image-capable models. Off by default; Pi's read tool already returns images, so view_image is mainly for prompt parity with the Codex CLI.

settings.label: Restrict view_image to workspace
settings.description: Reject view_image paths outside ctx.cwd. Off by default so clipboard paste from /tmp keeps working.

settings.label: Enable apply_patch
settings.description: Expose the apply_patch tool while preserving Pi edit/write unless strict patch mode is enabled.

settings.label: Strict patch mode
settings.description: Block edit/write on supported models so edits must use apply_patch. Off by default.

settings.label: Allow absolute patch paths
settings.description: Permit absolute paths in apply_patch. Off by default; relative paths stay anchored to ctx.cwd.

settings.label: Defer apply_patch rendering
settings.description: Do not define apply_patch renderers; let pi-tool-renderer or Pi's fallback renderer handle display to avoid duplicate formatting.

author: vanillagreen
